focus.midnightconfig.title: Lock-On Settings
focus.lock_on_client.general.desc: Core lock-on behavior and HUD settings.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.desc: Camera behavior and shoulder transition tuning.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwap.desc: Directional target switching and smoothing behavior.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilters.desc: Choose which entities can be considered for lock-on.
focus.lock_on_client.general.autoSwitchT: Automatically switch to rear third-person when lock-on starts.
focus.lock_on_client.general.allowFirstP: Allow entering and staying in first-person while locked on.
focus.lock_on_client.general.allowFrontF: Allow Front Third-Person While Locked On
Allow front-facing third-person while locked on.
Enable first-person lock-on to edit this option.
focus.lock_on_client.general.showLockOnD: Show debug text in the HUD while a target is locked.
focus.lock_on_client.general.lockOnIndic: Choose the lock-on indicator texture style.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.useCustomSwa: When disabled, the opposite shoulder mirrors X offset and rotation from the edited shoulder.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.cameraMode.d: Static keeps the selected shoulder preset. Dynamic auto-adjusts shoulder and camera spacing.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.cameraFloati: How strongly the camera follows the target point. Lower values feel floatier.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.cameraDrag.d: Adds rotational lag while aiming. Higher values increase catch-up delay.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.cameraSwapSp: How quickly manual shoulder swaps transition in Static mode.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.cameraSwapSm: How much easing is applied to manual shoulder swaps in Static mode.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.dynamicCamer: How quickly Dynamic mode transitions between shoulders.
How much easing is applied to Dynamic shoulder transitions.
Camera editor and preset profile actions.
Preset profile name used by the load/delete/save profile actions below.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.selectedCame: Preset profile name used by the load/delete/save profile actions below.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.saveSelected: Save all current tuning values into the selected profile name.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.loadSelected: Load all tuning values from the selected profile.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.openCameraPo: Open a live preview editor for lock-on third-person camera offsets and rotation.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwap.targetSw: Ignore tiny mouse motion below this amount while locked on.
Required mouse movement before directional target switching can trigger.
How closely a candidate direction must match your mouse direction.
Minimum on-screen distance from the current target to allow a switch.
How quickly stored mouse input fades when a switch does not trigger.
Delay between successful directional target switches.
How long aim smoothing remains active after switching targets.
Maximum yaw step per tick during post-switch smoothing.
Maximum pitch step per tick during post-switch smoothing.
How quickly target-point smoothing adapts after switching targets.
How strongly player yaw/pitch follows lock-on aim at switch start. Lower values reduce snap.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilters.enabl: Apply filtering rules to lock-on and directional target switching.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilters.targe: Exclude ignores matching targets. Exclusive only allows matching targets.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilters.filte: Include passive mobs in filtering rules.
Include neutral mobs in filtering rules.
Include hostile mobs in filtering rules.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilters.targe: Entity IDs to match in filtering rules (example: minecraft:zombie).
focus.lock_on_client.autoSwitchToThirdPe: Automatically switch to rear third-person when lock-on starts.
focus.lock_on_client.allowFirstPersonWhi: Allow entering and staying in first-person while locked on.
focus.lock_on_client.allowFrontFacingThi: Allow Front Third-Person While Locked On
Allow front-facing third-person while locked on.
Enable first-person lock-on to edit this option.
focus.lock_on_client.showLockOnDebugText: Show debug text in the HUD while a target is locked.
focus.lock_on_client.lockOnIndicatorStyl: Choose the lock-on indicator texture style.
focus.lock_on_client.useCustomSwappedSho: When disabled, the opposite shoulder mirrors X offset and rotation from the edited shoulder.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraMode.desc: Static keeps the selected shoulder preset. Dynamic auto-adjusts shoulder and camera spacing.
Use the selected shoulder preset exactly.
focus.lock_on_client.camera_mode.DYNAMIC: Adapt shoulder and camera spacing from player/target positioning.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraFloatiness.de: How strongly the camera follows the target point. Lower values feel floatier.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraDrag.desc: Adds rotational lag while aiming. Higher values increase catch-up delay.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraSwapSpeed.des: How quickly manual shoulder swaps transition in Static mode.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraSwapSmoothnes: How much easing is applied to manual shoulder swaps in Static mode.
focus.lock_on_client.dynamicCameraSwapSp: How quickly Dynamic mode transitions between shoulders.
focus.lock_on_client.dynamicCameraSwapSm: How much easing is applied to Dynamic shoulder transitions.
focus.lock_on_client.selectedCameraProfi: Preset profile name used by the load/delete/save profile actions below.
focus.lock_on_client.saveSelectedCameraP: Save all current tuning values into the selected profile name.
focus.lock_on_client.loadSelectedCameraP: Load all tuning values from the selected profile.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapMouseDead: Ignore tiny mouse motion below this amount while locked on.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapMouseActi: Required mouse movement before directional target switching can trigger.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapDirection: How closely a candidate direction must match your mouse direction.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapMinScreen: Minimum on-screen distance from the current target to allow a switch.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapInputDeca: How quickly stored mouse input fades when a switch does not trigger.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapCooldownT: Delay between successful directional target switches.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapSmoothTic: How long aim smoothing remains active after switching targets.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapLookMaxYa: Maximum yaw step per tick during post-switch smoothing.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapLookMaxPi: Maximum pitch step per tick during post-switch smoothing.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapTargetPoi: How quickly target-point smoothing adapts after switching targets.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapPlayerLoo: How strongly player yaw/pitch follows lock-on aim at switch start. Lower values reduce snap.
focus.lock_on_client.enableTargetFilters: Apply filtering rules to lock-on and directional target switching.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilterMode.de: Exclude ignores matching targets. Exclusive only allows matching targets.
Matching targets are ignored by lock-on.
Only matching targets can be locked on.
focus.lock_on_client.filterPassiveMobs.d: Include passive mobs in filtering rules.
focus.lock_on_client.filterNeutralMobs.d: Include neutral mobs in filtering rules.
focus.lock_on_client.filterHostileMobs.d: Include hostile mobs in filtering rules.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilterEntityI: Entity IDs to match in filtering rules (example: minecraft:zombie).
focus.lock_on_client.cameraOffsetX.desc: Horizontal offset for the lock-on third-person camera.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraOffsetY.desc: Vertical offset for the lock-on third-person camera.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraOffsetZ.desc: Backward distance for the lock-on third-person camera.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraRotation.desc: Yaw rotation around the player for the lock-on camera.
Horizontal offset for the right-shoulder lock-on camera.
Vertical offset for the right-shoulder lock-on camera.
Backward distance for the right-shoulder lock-on camera.
focus.lock_on_client.rightCameraRotation: Yaw rotation for the right-shoulder lock-on camera.
focus.lock_on_client.openCameraPositionE: Open a live preview editor for lock-on third-person camera offsets and rotation.
screen.focus.camera_editor.title: Lock-On Camera Position Editor
screen.focus.camera_editor.preview_hint: Live preview is active while this screen is open.
screen.focus.camera_editor.preview_hint_: Press H to show camera editor controls.
screen.focus.camera_editor.preset_saved: Full tuning setup copied to clipboard.
screen.focus.camera_editor.preset_import: Full tuning setup imported from clipboard.
Clipboard does not contain a valid full setup preset.
screen.focus.camera_editor.custom_swap_v: Swapped shoulder now mirrors edited values.
screen.focus.multiplayer_warning.title: Multiplayer Warning
screen.focus.multiplayer_warning.line1: Using Focus on servers without authorization may result in a ban.
screen.focus.multiplayer_warning.line2: Consult server admins before using this mod in multiplayer.
screen.focus.multiplayer_warning.line3: Please acknowledge this warning before continuing.
